title: Senior Doctor - AstraZeneca India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AstraZeneca India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!
